title: Rangu Rakkara Song Lyrics Sivalinga

Rangu Rakkara Song Lyrics #Sivalinga
#RanguRakkara #Anirudh #ThamanS

rangu rakkara
rakkara rakkara
rakkara rakkara

[ Hey
Daaladikkum kannakaari
naan irukken dontu worry
unakethukku acham acham?

asaigala allow pannu
achangala delete pannu
poi varalaam
uchcham uchcham

yen mieow meow
poonaikkellaam
mersal aagura.

baendha baendha
mulichikinnu
beethi adaiyura

total-aaga maari neeyum
vaadi trendy-ya

paar notta kooda
maathirichu namma INDIA
namma India

vaiyadi

oayamaaten daa
unna muthathaala
metha senji thoonga
vaippen daa

rangu rakkara
rakkara rakkara (3)
rakkara rakkara raa

Nee rendaairayam
rubaa note-u
naan serthu vaikkura
saettu
vaa munnum pinnum kaatu
idhu orginalaa doubtu

un kindal ellaam cuteu
naan aadiputen flattu
nee fixu pannu dateu
naan vaikkurenda treatu

Daaladikkum kannakaari
naan irukken dontu worry
unakethukku acham acham?

oru sentiment-a
jell-aagi naan irupenda
ne centimeter prinjaalum
naan thavippen da

rakkara rakkara raa

un kendakaala paathidave
kenjiduven di
un konda poova kondaa
naan kumbiduven di

rangu rakkara

rakkara rakkara raa

nee minnum pinnum massu
nan mullillaadha roseu
vaa polam kadhal race-u
idhu ooru pooraa newsu

nee watermelan juice-u
naan vaatamaana glassu
en valibame ice-u
ini vazhkai very nice-u

Daaladikkum kannakaari
naan irukken dontu worry
unakethukku acham acham?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rangu Rakkara'?

The song 'Rangu Rakkara' conveys a sense of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace happiness and dance.

What is the context of this song in the movie Sivalinga?

This song is featured in the movie Sivalinga, adding a lively atmosphere to the film's celebratory moments.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Rangu Rakkara'?

The song is sung by Anirudh and composed by Thaman S, showcasing their unique collaboration.

When was 'Rangu Rakkara' released?

'Rangu Rakkara' was released on January 3, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Rangu Rakkara' is a lively and energetic track that embodies the spirit of celebration and joy. It features Anirudh's captivating vocals, which perfectly complement Thaman S's upbeat composition. The lyrics encourage listeners to let go of their worries and embrace the moment, making it ideal for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rangu Rakkara is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anirudh's electrifying vocals and Thaman S's dynamic composition, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the infectious beats and let the music take over your spirit!
